context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: We need to mask PII in our logs before they leave the collector. We want to hash user IDs so we can still correlate with

checklist.name: no-suggest-deleting-the-fields-outright-when
checklist.description: Maps each PII requirement to the right OTTL primitive: SHA256 for the user ID (correlation-preserving hashing), replace_pattern or replace_all_patterns for card numbers in the body, and replace_pattern for the Authorization header value in span attributes. Does not suggest deleting the fields outright when the user asked for masking/hashing.
